### 🔍 Legal / Compliance Update

**What Changed:**  
Updated Terms of Service and refreshed GDPR-aligned data flow documentation.

**Why:**  
To ensure compliance with current data protection regulations (e.g., GDPR) and maintain alignment with legal, security, and operational standards.

**Affected Teams:**  
- Legal  
- Security  
- Product  
- Engineering  
- Infrastructure  
- Mobile  
- DevOps  

**Checklist:**  
- [ ] Legal review completed  
- [ ] Data retention and deletion policies verified  
- [ ] Data processing, flow, and usage mapped and documented  
- [ ] Privacy Impact Assessment (PIA) conducted (if required)  
- [ ] Cross-border data transfer mechanisms validated (e.g., SCCs, adequacy decisions)  
- [ ] App store disclosures (iOS & Android) updated  
- [ ] Third-party services (e.g., Stripe, Sentry, Umami) audited for compliance  
- [ ] GCP/Kubernetes environments checked for data residency, access control, and logging  
- [ ] Cloudflare settings audited for privacy, TLS, and compliance alignment  
- [ ] External legal/privacy policies updated  
- [ ] Internal documentation and access reviewed  
- [ ] Incident response, audit trails, and breach protocols revalidated  

**Tools & Environment:**  
SaaS | bun | TypeScript | valibot | GCP | Kubernetes | Stripe | Argo | biome | Docker | Svelte | iOS | Android | App Stores | Umami | Observability Stack | Sentry | Cloudflare
